### Task 6: Create NotificationWorker

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/data/worker/NotificationWorker.kt`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the worker**

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.data.worker

import android.Manifest
import android.app.NotificationManager
import android.app.PendingIntent
import android.content.Context
import android.content.Intent
import android.content.pm.PackageManager
import android.os.Build
import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat
import androidx.hilt.work.HiltWorker
import androidx.work.CoroutineWorker
import androidx.work.WorkerParameters
import dagger.assisted.Assisted
import dagger.assisted.AssistedInject
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
import pub.hackers.android.MainActivity
import pub.hackers.android.R
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.NotificationStateManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.repository.HackersPubRepository
import pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Notification

@HiltWorker
class NotificationWorker @AssistedInject constructor(
    @Assisted appContext: Context,
    @Assisted workerParams: WorkerParameters,
    private val repository: HackersPubRepository,
    private val sessionManager: SessionManager,
    private val notificationStateManager: NotificationStateManager
) : CoroutineWorker(appContext, workerParams) {

    companion object {
        const val CHANNEL_ID = "hackerspub_notifications"
        const val NOTIFICATION_GROUP = "pub.hackers.android.NOTIFICATIONS"
        const val SUMMARY_NOTIFICATION_ID = 0
    }

    override suspend fun doWork(): Result {
        val isLoggedIn = sessionManager.isLoggedIn.first()
        if (!isLoggedIn) return Result.success()

        val result = repository.getNotifications(refresh = true)

        return result.fold(
            onSuccess = { notificationsResult ->
                val notifications = notificationsResult.notifications
                if (notifications.isEmpty()) return@fold Result.success()

                val newestId = notifications.first().id
                notificationStateManager.updateLastPolledId(newestId)

                if (hasNotificationPermission()) {
                    showNotifications(notifications)
                }

                Result.success()
            },
            onFailure = { error ->
                // Auth errors — don't retry
                val message = error.message ?: ""
                if (message.contains("401") || message.contains("403") || message.contains("unauthorized", ignoreCase = true)) {
                    return@fold Result.success()
                }
                // Network errors — retry with exponential backoff
                Result.retry()
            }
        )
    }

    private fun hasNotificationPermission(): Boolean {
        return if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
            ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(
                applicationContext,
                Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
            ) == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
        } else {
            true
        }
    }

    private fun showNotifications(notifications: List<Notification>) {
        val notificationManager = applicationContext.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager

        val intent = Intent(applicationContext, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
            putExtra("navigate_to", "notifications")
        }
        val pendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
            applicationContext,
            0,
            intent,
            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
        )

        // Show individual notifications (up to 5)
        notifications.take(5).forEachIndexed { index, notification ->
            val text = buildNotificationText(notification)
            val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(applicationContext, CHANNEL_ID)
                .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground)
                .setContentTitle("Hackers' Pub")
                .setContentText(text)
                .setAutoCancel(true)
                .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
                .setGroup(NOTIFICATION_GROUP)

            notificationManager.notify(index + 1, builder.build())
        }

        // Summary notification for grouping
        if (notifications.size > 1) {
            val summary = NotificationCompat.Builder(applicationContext, CHANNEL_ID)
                .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground)
                .setContentTitle("Hackers' Pub")
                .setContentText("${notifications.size} new notifications")
                .setAutoCancel(true)
                .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
                .setGroup(NOTIFICATION_GROUP)
                .setGroupSummary(true)
                .build()
            notificationManager.notify(SUMMARY_NOTIFICATION_ID, summary)
        }
    }

    private fun buildNotificationText(notification: Notification): String {
        val actorName = notification.actors.firstOrNull()?.name ?: "Someone"
        return when (notification) {
            is Notification.Follow -> "$actorName followed you"
            is Notification.Mention -> "$actorName mentioned you"
            is Notification.Reply -> "$actorName replied to your post"
            is Notification.Quote -> "$actorName quoted your post"
            is Notification.Share -> "$actorName shared your post"
            is Notification.React -> "$actorName reacted to your post"
        }
    }
}
```

Replace the entire file:

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.ui

import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
import androidx.work.Constraints
import androidx.work.ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy
import androidx.work.NetworkType
import androidx.work.PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder
import androidx.work.WorkManager
import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.SharingStarted
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.stateIn
import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.NotificationStateManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.PreferencesManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.worker.NotificationWorker
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
import javax.inject.Inject

@HiltViewModel
class AppViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val sessionManager: SessionManager,
    val preferencesManager: PreferencesManager,
    private val notificationStateManager: NotificationStateManager,
    private val workManager: WorkManager
) : ViewModel() {

    companion object {
        const val NOTIFICATION_WORK_NAME = "notification_poll"
    }

    val isLoggedIn: Flow<Boolean> = sessionManager.isLoggedIn

    val hasUnread: StateFlow<Boolean> = notificationStateManager.hasUnread
        .stateIn(viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), false)

    init {
        ensureNotificationPolling()
    }

    private fun ensureNotificationPolling() {
        viewModelScope.launch {
            val loggedIn = sessionManager.isLoggedIn.first()
            if (loggedIn) {
                enqueueNotificationPolling()
            }
        }
    }

    fun enqueueNotificationPolling() {
        val constraints = Constraints.Builder()
            .setRequiredNetworkType(NetworkType.CONNECTED)
            .build()

        val workRequest = PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder<NotificationWorker>(
            15, TimeUnit.MINUTES
        ).setConstraints(constraints).build()

        workManager.enqueueUniquePeriodicWork(
            NOTIFICATION_WORK_NAME,
            ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP,
            workRequest
        )
    }
}
```

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android

import android.Manifest
import android.content.Intent
import android.content.pm.PackageManager
import android.os.Build
import android.os.Bundle
import androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
import androidx.activity.compose.setContent
import androidx.activity.enableEdgeToEdge
import androidx.activity.result.contract.ActivityResultContracts
import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
import androidx.compose.material3.Surface
import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat
import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
import pub.hackers.android.ui.HackersPubApp
import pub.hackers.android.ui.theme.HackersPubTheme
import pub.hackers.android.ui.theme.LocalAppColors
import javax.inject.Inject

data class DeepLinkData(
    val token: String,
    val code: String
)

@AndroidEntryPoint
class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {

    @Inject
    lateinit var sessionManager: SessionManager

    private var deepLinkData by mutableStateOf<DeepLinkData?>(null)

    private val requestPermissionLauncher = registerForActivityResult(
        ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission()
    ) { _: Boolean ->
        // Permission result — no action needed, worker checks at post time
    }

    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
        handleDeepLink(intent)
        requestNotificationPermissionIfNeeded()
        enableEdgeToEdge()
        setContent {
            HackersPubTheme {
                Surface(
                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
                    color = LocalAppColors.current.background
                ) {
                    HackersPubApp(deepLinkData = deepLinkData)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent) {
        super.onNewIntent(intent)
        handleDeepLink(intent)
    }

    private fun requestNotificationPermissionIfNeeded() {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
            if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(
                    this, Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
                ) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
            ) {
                requestPermissionLauncher.launch(Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS)
            }
        }
    }

    private fun handleDeepLink(intent: Intent?) {
        val data = intent?.data ?: return
        if (data.scheme == "hackerspub" && data.host == "verify") {
            val token = data.getQueryParameter("token")
            val code = data.getQueryParameter("code")
            if (token != null && code != null) {
                deepLinkData = DeepLinkData(token = token, code = code)
            }
        }
    }
}
```

toolUseResult.content:
# Notification Polling Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Add background notification polling via WorkManager so users receive Android system notifications and see an unread dot on the bottom nav.

**Architecture:** A `CoroutineWorker` polls the existing GraphQL `Notifications` query every 15 minutes. A singleton `NotificationStateManager` persists last-seen/last-polled IDs in DataStore and exposes a `Flow<Boolean>` for unread state. The UI collects this flow to drive the bottom nav dot.

**Tech Stack:** WorkManager 2.10, Hilt Work 1.2, DataStore Preferences, Apollo GraphQL, Jetpack Compose

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-25-notification-polling-design.md`

---

### Task 3: Create NotificationStateManager

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/data/local/NotificationStateManager.kt`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the file**

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.data.local

import androidx.datastore.core.DataStore
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.Preferences
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.edit
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.stringPreferencesKey
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
import javax.inject.Inject
import javax.inject.Singleton

@Singleton
class NotificationStateManager @Inject constructor(
    private val dataStore: DataStore<Preferences>
) {
    companion object {
        private val LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID = stringPreferencesKey("last_seen_notification_id")
        private val LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID = stringPreferencesKey("last_polled_notification_id")
    }

    val hasUnread: Flow<Boolean> = dataStore.data.map { prefs ->
        val lastSeen = prefs[LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID]
        val lastPolled = prefs[LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID]
        lastPolled != null && lastPolled != lastSeen
    }

    suspend fun updateLastPolledId(id: String) {
        dataStore.edit { prefs ->
            prefs[LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID] = id
        }
    }

    suspend fun markAsSeen() {
        dataStore.edit { prefs ->
            val lastPolled = prefs[LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID]
            if (lastPolled != null) {
                prefs[LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID] = lastPolled
            }
        }
    }

    suspend fun clear() {
        dataStore.edit { prefs ->
            prefs.remove(LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID)
            prefs.remove(LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID)
        }
    }
}
```

        ).apply {
            description = "Notifications from Hackers' Pub"
        }
        val notificationManager = getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
        notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
    }
}

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.data.worker

import android.Manifest
import android.app.NotificationManager
import android.app.PendingIntent
import android.content.Context
import android.content.Intent
import android.content.pm.PackageManager
import android.os.Build
import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat
import androidx.hilt.work.HiltWorker
import androidx.work.CoroutineWorker
import androidx.work.WorkerParameters
import dagger.assisted.Assisted
import dagger.assisted.AssistedInject
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
import pub.hackers.android.MainActivity
import pub.hackers.android.R
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.NotificationStateManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.repository.HackersPubRepository
import pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Notification

@HiltWorker
class NotificationWorker @AssistedInject constructor(
    @Assisted appContext: Context,
    @Assisted workerParams: WorkerParameters,
    private val repository: HackersPubRepository,
    private val sessionManager: SessionManager,
    private val notificationStateManager: NotificationStateManager
) : CoroutineWorker(appContext, workerParams) {

    companion object {
        const val CHANNEL_ID = "hackerspub_notifications"
        const val NOTIFICATION_GROUP = "pub.hackers.android.NOTIFICATIONS"
        const val SUMMARY_NOTIFICATION_ID = 0
    }

    override suspend fun doWork(): Result {
        val isLoggedIn = sessionManager.isLoggedIn.first()
        if (!isLoggedIn) return Result.success()

        val result = repository.getNotifications(refresh = true)

        return result.fold(
            onSuccess = { notificationsResult ->
                val notifications = notificationsResult.notifications
                if (notifications.isEmpty()) return@fold Result.success()

                val newestId = notifications.first().id
                notificationStateManager.updateLastPolledId(newestId)

                if (hasNotificationPermission()) {
                    showNotifications(notifications)
                }

                Result.success()
            },
            onFailure = { error ->
                // Auth errors — don't retry
                val message = error.message ?: ""
                if (message.contains("401") || message.contains("403") || message.contains("unauthorized", ignoreCase = true)) {
                    return@fold Result.success()
                }
                // Network errors — retry with exponential backoff
                Result.retry()
            }
        )
    }

    private fun hasNotificationPermission(): Boolean {
        return if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
            ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(
                applicationContext,
                Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
            ) == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
        } else {
            true
        }
    }

    private fun showNotifications(notifications: List<Notification>) {
        val notificationManager = applicationContext.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager

        val intent = Intent(applicationContext, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
            putExtra("navigate_to", "notifications")
        }
        val pendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
            applicationContext,
            0,
            intent,
            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
        )

        // Show individual notifications (up to 5)
        notifications.take(5).forEachIndexed { index, notification ->
            val text = buildNotificationText(notification)
            val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(applicationContext, CHANNEL_ID)
                .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground)
                .setContentTitle("Hackers' Pub")
                .setContentText(text)
                .setAutoCancel(true)
                .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
                .setGroup(NOTIFICATION_GROUP)

            notificationManager.notify(index + 1, builder.build())
        }

        // Summary notification for grouping
        if (notifications.size > 1) {
            val summary = NotificationCompat.Builder(applicationContext, CHANNEL_ID)
                .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground)
                .setContentTitle("Hackers' Pub")
                .setContentText("${notifications.size} new notifications")
                .setAutoCancel(true)
                .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
                .setGroup(NOTIFICATION_GROUP)
                .setGroupSummary(true)
                .build()
            notificationManager.notify(SUMMARY_NOTIFICATION_ID, summary)
        }
    }

    private fun buildNotificationText(notification: Notification): String {
        val actorName = notification.actors.firstOrNull()?.name ?: "Someone"
        return when (notification) {
            is Notification.Follow -> "$actorName followed you"
            is Notification.Mention -> "$actorName mentioned you"
            is Notification.Reply -> "$actorName replied to your post"
            is Notification.Quote -> "$actorName quoted your post"
            is Notification.Share -> "$actorName shared your post"
            is Notification.React -> "$actorName reacted to your post"
        }
    }
}
```

```kotlin
package pub.hackers.android.ui

import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
import androidx.work.Constraints
import androidx.work.ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy
import androidx.work.NetworkType
import androidx.work.PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder
import androidx.work.WorkManager
import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.SharingStarted
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.stateIn
import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.NotificationStateManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.PreferencesManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
import pub.hackers.android.data.worker.NotificationWorker
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
import javax.inject.Inject

@HiltViewModel
class AppViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val sessionManager: SessionManager,
    val preferencesManager: PreferencesManager,
    private val notificationStateManager: NotificationStateManager,
    private val workManager: WorkManager
) : ViewModel() {

    companion object {
        const val NOTIFICATION_WORK_NAME = "notification_poll"
    }

    val isLoggedIn: Flow<Boolean> = sessionManager.isLoggedIn

    val hasUnread: StateFlow<Boolean> = notificationStateManager.hasUnread
        .stateIn(viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), false)

    init {
        ensureNotificationPolling()
    }

    private fun ensureNotificationPolling() {
        viewModelScope.launch {
            val loggedIn = sessionManager.isLoggedIn.first()
            if (loggedIn) {
                enqueueNotificationPolling()
            }
        }
    }

    fun enqueueNotificationPolling() {
        val constraints = Constraints.Builder()
            .setRequiredNetworkType(NetworkType.CONNECTED)
            .build()

        val workRequest = PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder<NotificationWorker>(
            15, TimeUnit.MINUTES
        ).setConstraints(constraints).build()

        workManager.enqueueUniquePeriodicWork(
            NOTIFICATION_WORK_NAME,
            ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP,
            workRequest
        )
    }
}
```

        }
    }

import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
import pub.hackers.android.ui.HackersPubApp
import pub.hackers.android.ui.theme.HackersPubTheme
import pub.hackers.android.ui.theme.LocalAppColors
import javax.inject.Inject

data class DeepLinkData(
    val token: String,
    val code: String
)

@AndroidEntryPoint
class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {

    @Inject
    lateinit var sessionManager: SessionManager

    private var deepLinkData by mutableStateOf<DeepLinkData?>(null)

    private val requestPermissionLauncher = registerForActivityResult(
        ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission()
    ) { _: Boolean ->
        // Permission result — no action needed, worker checks at post time
    }

    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
        handleDeepLink(intent)
        requestNotificationPermissionIfNeeded()
        enableEdgeToEdge()
        setContent {
            HackersPubTheme {
                Surface(
                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
                    color = LocalAppColors.current.background
                ) {
                    HackersPubApp(deepLinkData = deepLinkData)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent) {
        super.onNewIntent(intent)
        handleDeepLink(intent)
    }

    private fun requestNotificationPermissionIfNeeded() {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
            if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(
                    this, Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
                ) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
            ) {
                requestPermissionLauncher.launch(Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS)
            }
        }
    }

    private fun handleDeepLink(intent: Intent?) {
        val data = intent?.data ?: return
        if (data.scheme == "hackerspub" && data.host == "verify") {
            val token = data.getQueryParameter("token")
            val code = data.getQueryParameter("code")
            if (token != null && code != null) {
                deepLinkData = DeepLinkData(token = token, code = code)
            }
        }
    }
}
```

1→# Notification Polling Implementation Plan
     2→
     3→> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
     4→
     5→**Goal:** Add background notification polling via WorkManager so users receive Android system notifications and see an unread dot on the bottom nav.
     6→
     7→**Architecture:** A `CoroutineWorker` polls the existing GraphQL `Notifications` query every 15 minutes. A singleton `NotificationStateManager` persists last-seen/last-polled IDs in DataStore and exposes a `Flow<Boolean>` for unread state. The UI collects this flow to drive the bottom nav dot.

   144→- [ ] **Step 1: Create the file**
   145→
   146→```kotlin
   147→package pub.hackers.android.data.local
   148→
   149→import androidx.datastore.core.DataStore
   150→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.Preferences
   151→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.edit
   152→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.stringPreferencesKey
   153→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
   154→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
   155→import javax.inject.Inject
   156→import javax.inject.Singleton
   157→
   158→@Singleton
   159→class NotificationStateManager @Inject constructor(
   160→    private val dataStore: DataStore<Preferences>
   161→) {
   162→    companion object {
   163→        private val LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID = stringPreferencesKey("last_seen_notification_id")
   164→        private val LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID = stringPreferencesKey("last_polled_notification_id")
   165→    }
   166→
   167→    val hasUnread: Flow<Boolean> = dataStore.data.map { prefs ->
   168→        val lastSeen = prefs[LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID]
   169→        val lastPolled = prefs[LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID]
   170→        lastPolled != null && lastPolled != lastSeen
   171→    }
   172→
   173→    suspend fun updateLastPolledId(id: String) {
   174→        dataStore.edit { prefs ->
   175→            prefs[LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID] = id
   176→        }
   177→    }
   178→
   179→    suspend fun markAsSeen() {
   180→        dataStore.edit { prefs ->
   181→            val lastPolled = prefs[LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID]
   182→            if (lastPolled != null) {
   183→                prefs[LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID] = lastPolled
   184→            }
   185→        }
   186→    }
   187→
   188→    suspend fun clear() {
   189→        dataStore.edit { prefs ->
   190→            prefs.remove(LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID)
   191→            prefs.remove(LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID)
   192→        }
   193→    }
   194→}
   195→```

   317→
   318→**Files:**

   320→
   321→- [ ] **Step 1: Create the worker**
   322→
   323→```kotlin
   324→package pub.hackers.android.data.worker
   325→
   326→import android.Manifest
   327→import android.app.NotificationManager
   328→import android.app.PendingIntent
   329→import android.content.Context
   330→import android.content.Intent
   331→import android.content.pm.PackageManager
   332→import android.os.Build
   333→import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
   334→import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat
   335→import androidx.hilt.work.HiltWorker
   336→import androidx.work.CoroutineWorker
   337→import androidx.work.WorkerParameters
   338→import dagger.assisted.Assisted
   339→import dagger.assisted.AssistedInject
   340→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
   341→import pub.hackers.android.MainActivity
   342→import pub.hackers.android.R
   343→import pub.hackers.android.data.local.NotificationStateManager
   344→import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
   345→import pub.hackers.android.data.repository.HackersPubRepository
   346→import pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Notification
   347→
   348→@HiltWorker
   349→class NotificationWorker @AssistedInject constructor(
   350→    @Assisted appContext: Context,
   351→    @Assisted workerParams: WorkerParameters,
   352→    private val repository: HackersPubRepository,
   353→    private val sessionManager: SessionManager,
   354→    private val notificationStateManager: NotificationStateManager
   355→) : CoroutineWorker(appContext, workerParams) {
   356→
   357→    companion object {
   358→        const val CHANNEL_ID = "hackerspub_notifications"
   359→        const val NOTIFICATION_GROUP = "pub.hackers.android.NOTIFICATIONS"
   360→        const val SUMMARY_NOTIFICATION_ID = 0
   361→    }
   362→
   363→    override suspend fun doWork(): Result {
   364→        val isLoggedIn = sessionManager.isLoggedIn.first()
   365→        if (!isLoggedIn) return Result.success()
   366→
   367→        val result = repository.getNotifications(refresh = true)
   368→
   369→        return result.fold(
   370→            onSuccess = { notificationsResult ->
   371→                val notifications = notificationsResult.notifications
   372→                if (notifications.isEmpty()) return@fold Result.success()
   373→
   374→                val newestId = notifications.first().id
   375→                notificationStateManager.updateLastPolledId(newestId)
   376→
   377→                if (hasNotificationPermission()) {
   378→                    showNotifications(notifications)
   379→                }
   380→
   381→                Result.success()
   382→            },
   383→            onFailure = { error ->
   384→                // Auth errors — don't retry
   385→                val message = error.message ?: ""
   386→                if (message.contains("401") || message.contains("403") || message.contains("unauthorized", ignoreCase = true)) {
   387→                    return@fold Result.success()
   388→                }
   389→                // Network errors — retry with exponential backoff
   390→                Result.retry()
   391→            }
   392→        )
   393→    }
   394→
   395→    private fun hasNotificationPermission(): Boolean {
   396→        return if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
   397→            ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(
   398→                applicationContext,
   399→                Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
   400→            ) == PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
   401→        } else {
   402→            true
   403→        }
   404→    }
   405→
   406→    private fun showNotifications(notifications: List<Notification>) {
   407→        val notificationManager = applicationContext.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
   408→
   409→        val intent = Intent(applicationContext, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   410→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   411→            putExtra("navigate_to", "notifications")
   412→        }
   413→        val pendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   414→            applicationContext,
   415→            0,
   416→            intent,
   417→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   418→        )
   419→
   420→        // Show individual notifications (up to 5)
   421→        notifications.take(5).forEachIndexed { index, notification ->
   422→            val text = buildNotificationText(notification)
   423→            val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(applicationContext, CHANNEL_ID)
   424→                .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground)
   425→                .setContentTitle("Hackers' Pub")
   426→                .setContentText(text)
   427→                .setAutoCancel(true)
   428→                .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
   429→                .setGroup(NOTIFICATION_GROUP)
   430→
   431→            notificationManager.notify(index + 1, builder.build())
   432→        }
   433→
   434→        // Summary notification for grouping
   435→        if (notifications.size > 1) {
   436→            val summary = NotificationCompat.Builder(applicationContext, CHANNEL_ID)
   437→                .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground)
   438→                .setContentTitle("Hackers' Pub")
   439→                .setContentText("${notifications.size} new notifications")
   440→                .setAutoCancel(true)
   441→                .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
   442→                .setGroup(NOTIFICATION_GROUP)
   443→                .setGroupSummary(true)
   444→                .build()
   445→            notificationManager.notify(SUMMARY_NOTIFICATION_ID, summary)
   446→        }
   447→    }
   448→
   449→    private fun buildNotificationText(notification: Notification): String {
   450→        val actorName = notification.actors.firstOrNull()?.name ?: "Someone"
   451→        return when (notification) {
   452→            is Notification.Follow -> "$actorName followed you"
   453→            is Notification.Mention -> "$actorName mentioned you"
   454→            is Notification.Reply -> "$actorName replied to your post"
   455→            is Notification.Quote -> "$actorName quoted your post"
   456→            is Notification.Share -> "$actorName shared your post"
   457→            is Notification.React -> "$actorName reacted to your post"
   458→        }
   459→    }
   460→}

   545→

1→# Notification Polling via WorkManager
     2→
     3→**Issue:** [#67 — Push notification support](https://github.com/hackers-pub/android/issues/67)
     4→**Date:** 2026-03-25
     5→
     6→## Overview
     7→
     8→Background notification polling using WorkManager's `PeriodicWorkRequest` (15-minute interval). Polls the existing GraphQL `Notifications` query, shows Android system notifications for new items, and wires up the unread dot on the bottom nav.
     9→
    10→## Dependencies & Permissions
    11→
    12→### New dependencies (`libs.versions.toml`)
    13→
    14→- `androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx:2.10.0`
    15→- `androidx.hilt:hilt-work:1.2.0`
    16→- `androidx.hilt:hilt-compiler:1.2.0` (KSP processor)
    17→
    18→### Manifest
    19→
    20→- `<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />`
    21→- Disable default `WorkManagerInitializer` to allow custom Hilt-based initialization:
    22→  ```xml
    23→  <provider
    24→      android:name="androidx.startup.InitializationProvider"
    25→      android:authorities="${applicationId}.androidx-startup"
    26→      android:exported="false"
    27→      tools:node="merge">
    28→      <meta-data
    29→          android:name="androidx.work.WorkManagerInitializer"
    30→          tools:node="remove" />
    31→  </provider>
    32→  ```
    33→
    34→## Architecture
    35→
    36→```
    37→┌─────────────────┐     writes      ┌──────────────────────┐    derives     ┌──────────────┐
    38→│ NotificationWorker│ ──────────────→ │ NotificationStateManager│ ──────────→ │ hasUnread Flow│
    39→│ (CoroutineWorker) │                │ (@Singleton)            │              └──────┬───────┘
    40→└────────┬─────────┘                └───────────┬────────────┘                     │
    41→         │                                      │                                  │ collect
    42→         │ fetches                              │ markAsSeen()                     ▼
    43→         ▼                                      │                          ┌──────────────┐
    44→┌─────────────────┐                   ┌─────────┴──────────┐              │ AppViewModel  │
    45→│ HackersPubRepo   │                   │NotificationsViewModel│              │ → BottomNav   │
    46→│ .getNotifications│                   └────────────────────┘              └──────────────┘
    47→└─────────────────┘
    48→```
    49→
    50→## Data Layer
    51→
    52→### `NotificationStateManager` (`data/local/NotificationStateManager.kt`)
    53→
    54→`@Singleton` with `@Inject constructor`, injected with the Hilt-provided `DataStore<Preferences>` (the `"hackerspub_prefs"` instance from `AppModule`). Notification state is session-scoped, so it belongs alongside session data.
    55→
    56→**DataStore keys** (owned by this class, not `PreferencesManager`):
    57→
    58→| Key | Type | Purpose |
    59→|-----|------|---------|
    60→| `LAST_SEEN_NOTIFICATION_ID` | `String` | ID of the newest notification the user has seen (updated on every notifications screen load/refresh) |
    61→| `LAST_POLLED_NOTIFICATION_ID` | `String` | ID of the newest notification from the last background poll |
    62→
    63→Two IDs instead of a boolean flag so the unread state can be accurately derived after app restart without re-fetching.
    64→
    65→**API:**
    66→
    67→- `val hasUnread: Flow<Boolean>` — cold Flow derived from DataStore, true when last-polled ID differs from last-seen ID. Consumers (e.g. `AppViewModel`) convert to `StateFlow` via `stateIn` in their own scope.
    68→- `suspend fun updateLastPolledId(id: String)` — called by worker after fetching new notifications
    69→- `suspend fun markAsSeen()` — called on every successful notifications load/refresh; sets last-seen = last-polled
    70→- `suspend fun clear()` — called on logout; resets both IDs
    71→
    72→## NotificationWorker (`data/worker/NotificationWorker.kt`)
    73→
    74→`@HiltWorker` extending `CoroutineWorker`. Injected with `HackersPubRepository`, `SessionManager`, `NotificationStateManager`.
    75→
    76→### Execution flow
    77→
    78→1. Check `sessionManager.isLoggedIn.first()` — return `Result.success()` if not logged in
    79→2. Call `repository.getNotifications(refresh = true)` to fetch the latest page
    80→3. On failure: distinguish auth errors (return `Result.success()`, not worth retrying) from network errors (return `Result.retry()` with default exponential backoff starting at 10s)
    81→4. Compare first notification ID against last polled ID
    82→5. If different:
    83→   - `notificationStateManager.updateLastPolledId(newId)`
    84→   - Build and post Android system notifications for the new items (only if `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission is granted)
    85→6. Return `Result.success()`
    86→
    87→### System notifications
    88→
    89→- Notification channel created in `HackersPubApplication.onCreate()`: ID `"hackerspub_notifications"`, name "Hackers' Pub"
    90→- Group multiple notifications under a summary
    91→- Each notification includes: actor name + action (e.g. "alice mentioned you")
    92→- `PendingIntent` targets `MainActivity` with an extra/URI that the Compose nav controller routes to the notifications screen
    93→- Respects `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission — worker polls regardless, but only posts notifications if permission is granted
    94→
    95→## Worker Registration & Lifecycle
    96→
    97→### Scheduling
    98→
    99→- **After login:** Enqueue `PeriodicWorkRequestBuilder<NotificationWorker>(15, TimeUnit.MINUTES)` with unique name `"notification_poll"`, policy `ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP`, constraint `NetworkType.CONNECTED`
   100→- **On app launch (already logged in):** `AppViewModel.init` enqueues with `KEEP` policy (safe to call multiple times; does not restart the interval)
   101→
   102→### Cancellation
   103→
   104→- **On logout:**
   105→  - `WorkManager.cancelUniqueWork("notification_poll")`
   106→  - `NotificationStateManager.clear()`
   107→  - `NotificationManager.cancelAll()` — dismiss any posted system notifications from the previous session
   108→
   109→### WorkManager initialization
   110→
   111→- `HackersPubApplication` implements `Configuration.Provider` to provide Hilt's `HiltWorkerFactory`
   112→- Default `WorkManagerInitializer` disabled in manifest (see Manifest section above)
   113→
   114→## UI Wiring
   115→
   116→### `AppViewModel`
   117→
   118→- Inject `NotificationStateManager` and `WorkManager`
   119→- Expose `val hasUnread: StateFlow<Boolean>` via `notificationStateManager.hasUnread.stateIn(viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), false)`
   120→- Call `ensureNotificationPolling()` in `init` (enqueues work if logged in)
   121→
   122→### `HackersPubApp.kt`
   123→
   124→- Collect `appViewModel.hasUnread`
   125→- Pass to notifications `BottomNavItem`: `hasNotificationDot = hasUnread`
   126→
   127→### `NotificationsViewModel`
   128→
   129→- Inject `NotificationStateManager`
   130→- Call `markAsSeen()` on every successful load and refresh (not just initial load)
   131→
   132→### POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission
   133→
   134→- Request in `MainActivity` on Android 13+ via `rememberLauncherForActivityResult`
   135→- Prompt after first successful login, not on cold start
   136→- Worker polls regardless of permission; it just skips posting system notifications if denied
   137→
   138→## New Files
   139→
   140→| File | Purpose |
   141→|------|---------|
   142→| `data/local/NotificationStateManager.kt` | Singleton managing unread state via DataStore |
   143→| `data/worker/NotificationWorker.kt` | Background polling worker |
   144→
   145→## Modified Files
   146→
   147→| File | Change |
   148→|------|--------|
   149→| `gradle/libs.versions.toml` | Add WorkManager + Hilt Work dependencies |
   150→| `app/build.gradle.kts` | Add new dependency entries |
   151→| `AndroidManifest.xml` | Add `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission, disable default `WorkManagerInitializer` |
   152→| `HackersPubApplication.kt` | Implement `Configuration.Provider` for HiltWorkerFactory, create notification channel |
   153→| `di/AppModule.kt` | Add `@Provides` for `WorkManager.getInstance(context)` |
   154→| `ui/AppViewModel.kt` | Expose `hasUnread`, enqueue polling on init |
   155→| `ui/HackersPubApp.kt` | Wire `hasNotificationDot` from `hasUnread` state |
   156→| `ui/screens/notifications/NotificationsViewModel.kt` | Call `markAsSeen()` on every load/refresh |
   157→| `MainActivity.kt` | Request `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission after login |
   158→
   159→## Notes
   160→
   161→- **ProGuard/R8:** Verify that `hilt-work`'s bundled consumer rules are sufficient for `@HiltWorker` with `isMinifyEnabled = true`. Add explicit keep rules for `NotificationWorker` if needed.
   162→- **Race condition:** If the worker fires while the user is on the notifications screen, `markAsSeen()` is called on every refresh, so the dot will clear on the next pull-to-refresh. This minor race is acceptable.
   163→- **Future:** If the backend adds WebPush support, UnifiedPush + embedded FCM can be layered on top for real-time delivery. The polling remains as a fallback.
   164→

1→package pub.hackers.android.di
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import androidx.datastore.core.DataStore
     5→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.Preferences
     6→import androidx.datastore.preferences.preferencesDataStore
     7→import com.apollographql.apollo.ApolloClient
     8→import com.apollographql.apollo.cache.normalized.normalizedCache
     9→import com.apollographql.apollo.cache.normalized.sql.SqlNormalizedCacheFactory
    10→import com.apollographql.apollo.network.okHttpClient
    11→import dagger.Module
    12→import dagger.Provides
    13→import dagger.hilt.InstallIn
    14→import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
    15→import dagger.hilt.components.SingletonComponent
    16→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
    17→import kotlinx.coroutines.runBlocking
    18→import okhttp3.Interceptor
    19→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
    20→import pub.hackers.android.data.local.SessionManager
    21→import javax.inject.Singleton
    22→
    23→private val Context.dataStore: DataStore<Preferences> by preferencesDataStore(name = "hackerspub_prefs")
    24→
    25→@Module
    26→@InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
    27→object AppModule {
    28→
    29→    @Provides
    30→    @Singleton
    31→    fun provideDataStore(@ApplicationContext context: Context): DataStore<Preferences> {
    32→        return context.dataStore
    33→    }
    34→
    35→    @Provides
    36→    @Singleton
    37→    fun provideSessionManager(dataStore: DataStore<Preferences>): SessionManager {
    38→        return SessionManager(dataStore)
    39→    }
    40→
    41→    @Provides
    42→    @Singleton
    43→    fun provideApolloClient(
    44→        @ApplicationContext context: Context,
    45→        sessionManager: SessionManager
    46→    ): ApolloClient {
    47→        val sqlNormalizedCacheFactory = SqlNormalizedCacheFactory(context, "apollo_cache.db")
    48→
    49→        val authInterceptor = Interceptor { chain ->
    50→            val token = runBlocking { sessionManager.sessionToken.first() }
    51→            val request = if (token != null) {
    52→                chain.request().newBuilder()
    53→                    .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $token")
    54→                    .build()
    55→            } else {
    56→                chain.request()
    57→            }
    58→            chain.proceed(request)
    59→        }
    60→
    61→        val okHttpClient = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    62→            .addInterceptor(authInterceptor)
    63→            .build()
    64→
    65→        return ApolloClient.Builder()
    66→            .serverUrl("https://hackers.pub/graphql")
    67→            .okHttpClient(okHttpClient)
    68→            .normalizedCache(sqlNormalizedCacheFactory)
    69→            .build()
    70→    }
    71→}

    88→sealed class DetailScreen(val route: String) {
    89→    data object SignIn : DetailScreen("signin?token={token}&code={code}") {
    90→        fun createRoute(token: String? = null, code: String? = null): String {
    91→            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
    92→            if (token != null) params.add("token=$token")
    93→            if (code != null) params.add("code=$code")
    94→            return if (params.isEmpty()) "signin" else "signin?${params.joinToString("&")}"
    95→        }
    96→    }
    97→    data object Compose : DetailScreen("compose?replyTo={replyTo}&quoteOf={quoteOf}") {
    98→        fun createRoute(replyTo: String? = null, quoteOf: String? = null): String {
    99→            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
   100→            if (replyTo != null) params.add("replyTo=$replyTo")
   101→            if (quoteOf != null) params.add("quoteOf=$quoteOf")
   102→            return if (params.isEmpty()) "compose" else "compose?${params.joinToString("&")}"
   103→        }
   104→    }
   105→    data object PostDetail : DetailScreen("post/{postId}") {
   106→        fun createRoute(postId: String) = "post/$postId"
   107→    }
   108→    data object Profile : DetailScreen("profile/{handle}") {
   109→        fun createRoute(handle: String) = "profile/$handle"
   110→    }
   111→}
   112→
   113→@Composable
   114→fun HackersPubApp(
   115→    deepLinkData: pub.hackers.android.DeepLinkData? = null,
   116→    viewModel: AppViewModel = hiltViewModel()
   117→) {
   118→    val navController = rememberNavController()
   119→    val isLoggedIn by viewModel.isLoggedIn.collectAsState(initial = false)
   120→
   121→    val fontSizePercent by viewModel.preferencesManager.fontSizePercent.collectAsState(initial = 100)
   122→
   123→    // Handle deep link for verification
   124→    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkData) {
   125→        deepLinkData?.let {
   126→            navController.navigate("signin?token=${it.token}&code=${it.code}")
   127→        }
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler(preferencesManager = viewModel.preferencesManager) {
   131→    CompositionLocalProvider(LocalFontScale provides (fontSizePercent / 100f)) {
   132→
   133→    val bottomNavItems = if (isLoggedIn) {
   134→        listOf(
   135→            BottomNavItem(
   136→                route = Screen.Timeline.route,
   137→                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_timeline),
   138→                icon = Icons.Outlined.Home,
   139→                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Home,
   140→            ),
   141→            BottomNavItem(
   142→                route = Screen.Explore.route,
   143→                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_explore),
   144→                icon = Icons.Outlined.Explore,
   145→                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Explore,
   146→            ),
   147→            BottomNavItem(
   148→                route = Screen.Notifications.route,
   149→                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_notifications),
   150→                icon = Icons.Outlined.Notifications,
   151→                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Notifications,
   152→                hasNotificationDot = false, // TODO: wire up unread notification state
   153→            ),
   154→            BottomNavItem(
   155→                route = Screen.Search.route,
   156→                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_search),
   157→                icon = Icons.Outlined.Search,
   158→                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Search,
   159→            ),
   160→        )
   161→    } else {
   162→        listOf(
   163→            BottomNavItem(
   164→                route = Screen.Explore.route,
   165→                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_explore),
   166→                icon = Icons.Outlined.Explore,
   167→                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Explore,
   168→            ),
   169→            BottomNavItem(
   170→                route = Screen.Search.route,
   171→                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_search),
   172→                icon = Icons.Outlined.Search,
   173→                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Search,
   174→            ),
   175→            BottomNavItem(
   176→                route = Screen.Settings.route,
   177→                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_settings),
   178→                icon = Icons.Outlined.Settings,
   179→                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Settings,
   180→            ),
   181→        )
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   185→    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   186→    val currentRoute = currentDestination?.route
   187→    val showBottomBar = bottomNavItems.any { it.route == currentRoute }
   188→
   189→    Scaffold(
   190→        bottomBar = {
   191→            if (showBottomBar) {
   192→                BottomNavBar(
   193→                    items = bottomNavItems,
   194→                    selectedRoute = currentRoute ?: "",
   195→                    onItemSelected = { item ->
   196→                        navController.navigate(item.route) {
   197→                            popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   198→                                saveState = true
   199→                            }
   200→                            launchSingleTop = true
   201→                            restoreState = true
   202→                        }
   203→                    },
   204→                )
   205→            }
   206→        }
   207→    ) { innerPadding ->
   208→        NavHost(
   209→            navController = navController,
   210→            startDestination = if (isLoggedIn) Screen.Timeline.route else Screen.Explore.route,
   211→            modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)
   212→        ) {
   213→            composable(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   214→                TimelineScreen(
   215→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   216→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   217→                    },
   218→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   219→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   220→                    },
   221→                    onComposeClick = { replyTo ->
   222→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo))
   223→                    },
   224→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   225→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   226→                    },
   227→                    onSettingsClick = {
   228→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Settings.route)
   229→                    }
   230→                )
   231→            }
   232→
   233→            composable(Screen.Notifications.route) {
   234→                NotificationsScreen(
   235→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   236→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   237→                    },
   238→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   239→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   240→                    }
   241→                )
   242→            }
   243→
   244→            composable(Screen.Explore.route) {
   245→                ExploreScreen(
   246→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   247→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   248→                    },
   249→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   250→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   251→                    },
   252→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   253→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(postId))
   254→                    },
   255→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   256→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   257→                    },
   258→                    onSignInClick = {
   259→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   260→                    },
   261→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   262→                )
   263→            }
   264→
   265→            composable(Screen.Search.route) {
   266→                SearchScreen(
   267→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   268→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   269→                    },
   270→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   271→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   272→                    },
   273→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   274→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   275→                    },
   276→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   277→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   278→                    }
   279→                )
   280→            }
   281→
   282→            composable(Screen.Settings.route) {
   283→                SettingsScreen(
   284→                    onSignInClick = {
   285→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   286→                    },
   287→                    onSignOutComplete = {
   288→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Explore.route) {
   289→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   290→                        }
   291→                    },
   292→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   293→                )
   294→            }
   295→
   296→            composable(
   297→                route = DetailScreen.SignIn.route,
   298→                arguments = listOf(
   299→                    navArgument("token") {
   300→                        type = NavType.StringType
   301→                        nullable = true
   302→                        defaultValue = null
   303→                    },
   304→                    navArgument("code") {
   305→                        type = NavType.StringType
   306→                        nullable = true
   307→                        defaultValue = null
   308→                    }
   309→                )
   310→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   311→                val token = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("token")
   312→                val code = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("code")
   313→                SignInScreen(
   314→                    deepLinkToken = token,
   315→                    deepLinkCode = code,
   316→                    onSignInSuccess = {
   317→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   318→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   319→                        }
   320→                    },
   321→                    onNavigateBack = {
   322→                        navController.popBackStack()
   323→                    }
   324→                )
   325→            }
   326→
   327→            composable(
   328→                route = DetailScreen.Compose.route,
   329→                arguments = listOf(
   330→                    navArgument("replyTo") {
   331→                        type = NavType.StringType
   332→                        nullable = true
   333→                        defaultValue = null
   334→                    },
   335→                    navArgument("quoteOf") {
   336→                        type = NavType.StringType
   337→                        nullable = true
   338→                        defaultValue = null
   339→                    }
   340→                )
   341→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   342→                val replyTo = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("replyTo")
   343→                val quoteOf = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("quoteOf")
   344→                ComposeScreen(
   345→                    replyToId = replyTo,
   346→                    quotedPostId = quoteOf,
   347→                    onPostSuccess = {
   348→                        navController.popBackStack()
   349→                    },
   350→                    onNavigateBack = {
   351→                        navController.popBackStack()
   352→                    }
   353→                )
   354→            }
   355→
   356→            composable(
   357→                route = DetailScreen.PostDetail.route,
   358→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("postId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   359→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   360→                val postId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("postId") ?: return@composable
   361→                PostDetailScreen(
   362→                    postId = postId,
   363→                    onNavigateBack = {
   364→                        navController.popBackStack()
   365→                    },
   366→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   367→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   368→                    },
   369→                    onReplyClick = { id ->
   370→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = id))
   371→                    },
   372→                    onQuoteClick = { id ->
   373→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = id))
   374→                    },
   375→                    onPostClick = { id ->
   376→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(id))
   377→                    },
   378→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   379→                )
   380→            }
   381→
   382→            composable(
   383→                route = DetailScreen.Profile.route,
   384→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("handle") { type = NavType.StringType })
   385→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   386→                val handle = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("handle") ?: return@composable
   387→                ProfileScreen(
   388→                    handle = handle,
   389→                    onNavigateBack = {
   390→                        navController.popBackStack()
   391→                    },
   392→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   393→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   394→                    },
   395→                    onProfileClick = { profileHandle ->
   396→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(profileHandle))
   397→                    },
   398→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   399→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   400→                    },
   401→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   402→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   403→                    }
   404→                )
   405→            }
   406→        }
   407→    }
   408→    } // CompositionLocalProvider
   409→    } // ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler
   410→}

    19→data class DeepLinkData(

    21→    val code: String

    24→@AndroidEntryPoint
    25→class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
    26→
    27→    private var deepLinkData by mutableStateOf<DeepLinkData?>(null)

    29→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {

    31→        handleDeepLink(intent)
    32→        enableEdgeToEdge()
    33→        setContent {

    50→    private fun handleDeepLink(intent: Intent?) {
    51→        val data = intent?.data ?: return
    52→        if (data.scheme == "hackerspub" && data.host == "verify") {
    53→            val token = data.getQueryParameter("token")
    54→            val code = data.getQueryParameter("code")
    55→            if (token != null && code != null) {
    56→                deepLinkData = DeepLinkData(token = token, code = code)
    57→            }
    58→        }
    59→    }

   206→                        )
   207→                        else -> null
   208→                    }
   209→                }
   210→
   211→                val replies = node.replies.edges.mapNotNull { edge ->
   212→                    edge.node.postFields.toPost(edge.node.sharedPost?.sharedPostFields?.toPost())
   213→                }
   214→
   215→                Result.success(

   355→    suspend fun createNote(
   356→        content: String,
   357→        language: String = "en",
   358→        visibility: PostVisibility = PostVisibility.PUBLIC,
   359→        replyTargetId: String? = null,
   360→        quotedPostId: String? = null
   361→    ): Result<Post> {
   362→        return try {
   363→            val gqlVisibility = when (visibility) {
   364→                PostVisibility.PUBLIC -> GqlPostVisibility.PUBLIC
   365→                PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> GqlPostVisibility.UNLISTED
   366→                PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> GqlPostVisibility.FOLLOWERS
   367→                PostVisibility.DIRECT -> GqlPostVisibility.DIRECT
   368→                PostVisibility.NONE -> GqlPostVisibility.NONE
   369→            }
   370→
   371→            val response = apolloClient.mutation(
   372→                CreateNoteMutation(
   373→                    content = content,
   374→                    language = language,
   375→                    visibility = gqlVisibility,
   376→                    replyTargetId = Optional.presentIfNotNull(replyTargetId),
   377→                    quotedPostId = Optional.presentIfNotNull(quotedPostId)
   378→                )
   379→            ).execute()
   380→
   381→            if (response.hasErrors()) {
   382→                Result.failure(Exception(response.errors?.firstOrNull()?.message ?: "Unknown error"))
   383→            } else {
   384→                val result = response.data?.createNote
   385→                when {
   386→                    result?.onCreateNotePayload != null -> {
   387→                        val note = result.onCreateNotePayload.note
   388→                        Result.success(
   389→                            Post(
   390→                                id = note.id,
   391→                                typename = "Note",
   392→                                name = null,
   393→                                published = Instant.parse(note.published.toString()),
   394→                                summary = null,
   395→                                content = note.content.toString(),
   396→                                excerpt = "",
   397→                                url = null,
   398→                                viewerHasShared = false,
   399→                                actor = Actor("", null, "", ""),
   400→                                media = emptyList(),
   401→                                engagementStats = EngagementStats(0, 0, 0, 0),
   402→                                mentions = emptyList()
   403→                            )
   404→                        )
   405→                    }
   406→                    result?.onInvalidInputError != null -> {
   407→                        Result.failure(Exception("Invalid input: ${result.onInvalidInputError.inputPath}"))
   408→                    }
   409→                    result?.onNotAuthenticatedError != null -> {
   410→                        Result.failure(Exception("Not authenticated"))
   411→                    }
   412→                    else -> Result.failure(Exception("Unknown error"))
   413→                }
   414→            }
   415→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   416→            Result.failure(e)
   417→        }
   418→    }

   420→    suspend fun sharePost(postId: String): Result<Unit> {

   423→

   426→            } else {

   748→    // Extension functions to convert GraphQL fragment types to domain models
   749→    private fun PostFields.toPost(
   750→        sharedPost: Post? = null,
   751→        replyTarget: Post? = null,
   752→        visibility: PostVisibility = PostVisibility.PUBLIC
   753→    ): Post {
   754→        return Post(
   755→            id = id,
   756→            typename = __typename,
   757→            name = name,
   758→            published = Instant.parse(published.toString()),
   759→            summary = summary,
   760→            content = content.toString(),
   761→            excerpt = excerpt,
   762→            url = url?.toString(),
   763→            iri = iri?.toString(),
   764→            viewerHasShared = viewerHasShared,
   765→            actor = actor.actorFields.toActor(),
   766→            media = media.map { it.mediaFields.toMedia() },
   767→            engagementStats = engagementStats.engagementStatsFields.toEngagementStats(),
   768→            mentions = mentions.edges.map { it.node.handle },
   769→            sharedPost = sharedPost,
   770→            replyTarget = replyTarget,
   771→            quotedPost = quotedPost?.sharedPostFields?.toPost(),
   772→            visibility = visibility,
   773→            reactionGroups = reactionGroups.mapNotNull { group ->
   774→                when {
   775→                    group.onEmojiReactionGroup != null -> ReactionGroup(
   776→                        emoji = group.onEmojiReactionGroup.emoji,
   777→                        customEmoji = null,
   778→                        count = group.onEmojiReactionGroup.reactors.totalCount,
   779→                        reactors = emptyList(),
   780→                        viewerHasReacted = group.onEmojiReactionGroup.reactors.viewerHasReacted
   781→                    )
   782→                    group.onCustomEmojiReactionGroup != null -> ReactionGroup(
   783→                        emoji = null,
   784→                        customEmoji = CustomEmoji(
   785→                            id = group.onCustomEmojiReactionGroup.customEmoji.id,
   786→                            name = group.onCustomEmojiReactionGroup.customEmoji.name,
   787→                            imageUrl = group.onCustomEmojiReactionGroup.customEmoji.imageUrl
   788→                        ),
   789→                        count = group.onCustomEmojiReactionGroup.reactors.totalCount,
   790→                        reactors = emptyList(),
   791→                        viewerHasReacted = group.onCustomEmojiReactionGroup.reactors.viewerHasReacted
   792→                    )
   793→                    else -> null
   794→                }
   795→            }
   796→        )
   797→    }

   837→    private fun EngagementStatsFields.toEngagementStats(): EngagementStats {
   838→        return EngagementStats(

   842→            quotes = quotes
   843→        )
   844→    }
   845→
   846→    private fun NotificationsQuery.Node.toNotification(): Notification? {
   847→        val actors = actors.edges.map { it.node.actorFields.toActor() }
   848→        val created = Instant.parse(created.toString())
   849→
   850→        return when {
   851→            onFollowNotification != null -> Notification.Follow(
   852→                id = id,
   853→                uuid = uuid.toString(),
   854→                created = created,
   855→                actors = actors
   856→            )
   857→            onMentionNotification != null -> Notification.Mention(
   858→                id = id,
   859→                uuid = uuid.toString(),
   860→                created = created,
   861→                actors = actors,
   862→                post = onMentionNotification.post?.postFields?.toPost()
   863→            )
   864→            onReplyNotification != null -> Notification.Reply(
   865→                id = id,
   866→                uuid = uuid.toString(),
   867→                created = created,
   868→                actors = actors,
   869→                post = onReplyNotification.post?.postFields?.toPost()
   870→            )
   871→            onQuoteNotification != null -> Notification.Quote(
   872→                id = id,
   873→                uuid = uuid.toString(),
   874→                created = created,
   875→                actors = actors,
   876→                post = onQuoteNotification.post?.postFields?.toPost()
   877→            )
   878→            onShareNotification != null -> Notification.Share(
   879→                id = id,
   880→                uuid = uuid.toString(),
   881→                created = created,
   882→                actors = actors,
   883→                post = onShareNotification.post?.postFields?.toPost()
   884→            )
   885→            onReactNotification != null -> Notification.React(
   886→                id = id,
   887→                uuid = uuid.toString(),
   888→                created = created,
   889→                actors = actors,
   890→                emoji = onReactNotification.emoji,
   891→                customEmoji = onReactNotification.customEmoji?.let {
   892→                    CustomEmoji(
   893→                        id = it.id,
   894→                        name = it.name,
   895→                        imageUrl = it.imageUrl
   896→                    )
   897→                },
   898→                post = onReactNotification.post?.postFields?.toPost()
   899→            )
   900→            else -> null
   901→        }
   902→    }
   903→
   904→    private fun GqlPostVisibility?.toPostVisibility(): PostVisibility {
   905→        return when (this) {
   906→            GqlPostVisibility.PUBLIC -> PostVisibility.PUBLIC
   907→            GqlPostVisibility.UNLISTED -> PostVisibility.UNLISTED
   908→            GqlPostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS
   909→            GqlPostVisibility.DIRECT -> PostVisibility.DIRECT
   910→            GqlPostVisibility.NONE -> PostVisibility.NONE
   911→            else -> PostVisibility.PUBLIC
   912→        }
   913→    }
   914→}

1→package pub.hackers.android.data.local
     2→
     3→import androidx.datastore.core.DataStore
     4→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.Preferences
     5→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.edit
     6→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.stringPreferencesKey
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
     9→import javax.inject.Inject
    10→import javax.inject.Singleton
    11→
    12→@Singleton
    13→class SessionManager @Inject constructor(
    14→    private val dataStore: DataStore<Preferences>
    15→) {
    16→    companion object {
    17→        private val SESSION_TOKEN_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("session_token")
    18→        private val USERNAME_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("username")
    19→        private val USER_ID_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("user_id")
    20→        private val USER_HANDLE_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("user_handle")
    21→        private val USER_NAME_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("user_name")
    22→        private val USER_AVATAR_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("user_avatar")
    23→    }
    24→
    25→    val sessionToken: Flow<String?> = dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
    26→        preferences[SESSION_TOKEN_KEY]
    27→    }
    28→
    29→    val isLoggedIn: Flow<Boolean> = dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
    30→        preferences[SESSION_TOKEN_KEY] != null
    31→    }
    32→
    33→    val username: Flow<String?> = dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
    34→        preferences[USERNAME_KEY]
    35→    }
    36→
    37→    val userId: Flow<String?> = dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
    38→        preferences[USER_ID_KEY]
    39→    }
    40→
    41→    val userHandle: Flow<String?> = dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
    42→        preferences[USER_HANDLE_KEY]
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    val userName: Flow<String?> = dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
    46→        preferences[USER_NAME_KEY]
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    val userAvatar: Flow<String?> = dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
    50→        preferences[USER_AVATAR_KEY]
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    suspend fun saveSession(
    54→        token: String,
    55→        userId: String,
    56→        username: String,
    57→        handle: String,
    58→        name: String,
    59→        avatarUrl: String
    60→    ) {
    61→        dataStore.edit { preferences ->
    62→            preferences[SESSION_TOKEN_KEY] = token
    63→            preferences[USER_ID_KEY] = userId
    64→            preferences[USERNAME_KEY] = username
    65→            preferences[USER_HANDLE_KEY] = handle
    66→            preferences[USER_NAME_KEY] = name
    67→            preferences[USER_AVATAR_KEY] = avatarUrl
    68→        }
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    suspend fun clearSession() {
    72→        dataStore.edit { preferences ->
    73→            preferences.remove(SESSION_TOKEN_KEY)
    74→            preferences.remove(USER_ID_KEY)
    75→            preferences.remove(USERNAME_KEY)
    76→            preferences.remove(USER_HANDLE_KEY)
    77→            preferences.remove(USER_NAME_KEY)
    78→            preferences.remove(USER_AVATAR_KEY)
    79→        }
    80→    }
    81→}
    82→

    27→data class Post(
